Explanation: The musician described matches Oliver Mtukudzi, who died at 66, released his first album in the 1970s, was a human rights activist, and had 67 albums by the end of his career. According to a Forbes Africa May 2017 feature, Mtukudzi had 65 albums at that time, as stated in multiple sources: "His Tuku Music album, featuring the smash hit Todii went gold in its first month of release in Zimbabwe... Oliver (Tuku) Mtukudzi has 65 albums under his belt" [56154], and "Zimbabwe's Oliver Tuku Mtukudzi who has 65 albums under his belt... The list is featured in the May edition of Forbes Africa magazine" [48151].
Exact Answer: 65 albums
Confidence: 100%
